title: Is the Monday.com site down?
excerpt:
Hey guys, Is Monday down? 
When I try to access the site, I get this message 
upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: local reset

posts.author: epjustin (Extus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys, Is Monday down?

When I try to access the site, I get this message
upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: local reset

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @epjustin

We are experiencing some issues with our homepage and a fix is being deployed as we speak!

You can follow the status of monday.com at all times via our status page: https://status.monday.com/
and Twitter page: @mondaydotstatus

Hope that helps!
